caption: A man with a tall, grey, styled wig and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a bow tie. He wears black headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone. Behind him, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items. Two distinct logos appear on screen: a white and red graphic with the text "T STALBIO PODCAST" and another red and white logo that reads "GOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man's mouth opens and closes as he speaks, and he slightly tilts his head and shifts his gaze, though his overall position remains centered in the frame. The lighting remains consistent across the scenes, maintaining a bright studio atmosphere.
